title: Rolson 28444 14-in-1 Rachet Handle Screwdriver
features: Forward and reverse racheting screwdriver with 1/4" Dr. magnetic bit holder
Complete with 60mm magnetic bit holder and 12pc 1/4" Dr x 25mm screwdriver bits
Slotted 4, 5, 6, 7mm, Crosspoint PH1, PH2, PH3. Pozi PZ1, PZ2, PZ3. Star T15, T20
description: Rolson offers a wide range of tools that are suitable from everyday use by the DIY enthusiast to on-the-job professionals. Our seal of approval allows you to feel confident that your chosen product has been manufactured to international standards, which comes well presented in the unique Rolson branded packaging. Rolson are constantly aiming to increase and improve their catalogue by introducing the most exciting, innovative and reliable products possible without compromising on their values of quality and safety.
